name: The Way Of Kings
short_description: In a time of scarce resources and zombie apocalypse, you will encounter seven women and experience good and evil with them, gradually growing up to be emperor.
detailed_description:
We didn't have enough money to make a living and continue development, so we had to look for investment, but they saw how poorly it sold and wanted us to make a new game. We have to make compromises in order to live, but I'm not giving up on this game, and here's how I plan to end up with the gameplay and story. I can only use my spare time to make it, and the final completion time is expected to be in early 28th. I'm sorry to have to keep you waiting for a long time, I have lowered the price, and you can purchase at your discretion. The game will be temporarily removed, and users who have already purchased it will be converted to private beta players

1. Free construction

Free to build houses and citadel equipment, build your doomsday shelter, defend against the tide of corpses, and spend the night safe

2. Make tools

Create tools and powerful weapons to deal with the apocalypse of zombies and crises

3. Cook food

Grow crops and cook food to sustain themselves and the women

4. Enrich the vehicle

Including carts, sports cars, trucks, tanks, helicopters and many other different types of vehicles, for you to ride the apocalypse and defend against powerful mutated monsters

5. Many monsters

Expect more than ten different monsters with different characteristics, and at certain times, tens of thousands of monster corpses will erupt and attack your base

6. Enrich the story

Take on a fantasy adventure with 7 beautiful women with different personalities, mesmerize them and help you become stronger

7. Character development

After the apocalypse, a special energy substance is produced, which causes the monsters to mutate, and their head generate a substance called magic Crystal, which can be killed to obtain this substance, and enhance their own and other character attributes

8. Final outcome

In the end, you will learn the truth of the apocalypse, become the savior, save all mankind, and live happily with your women

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
